productDisplayName: Levis Kids Boy's Devon White Kidswear
description: CompositionWhite sleeveless t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with football print hood tied with blue strings, branding in rubber print across the chest, blue piping on sleeves and red soft padding on the inner neck to soak sweatFittingRegular15 cmWash care Machine wash separately in cold water, colour likely to bleed Use mild detergent Can dry clean Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Dry flat inside out in shade Iron at medium setting only Iron on reverse Wash before wearing Transform the little joy into a young sporty hunk with this hooded tee from Levi's. The hood couples as a wind shield on a frosty day and a style statement on summery days. Team this with denim shorts and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with his small buddies, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on his skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
